name: io.github.bingshuoguo/grafana-v8-mcp
description: An MCP server for Grafana 8.4.7, providing access to dashboards, datasources, annotations, and legacy alerting.

environmentVariables.description: Service account token used to authenticate with your Grafana instance
environmentVariables.name: GRAFANA_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Username to authenticate with your Grafana instance
environmentVariables.name: GRAFANA_USERNAME

environmentVariables.description: Password to authenticate with your Grafana instance
environmentVariables.name: GRAFANA_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: Organization ID for multi-org support. Can also be set via X-Grafana-Org-Id header in SSE/streamable HTTP transports.
environmentVariables.name: GRAFANA_ORG_ID

environmentVariables.description: JSON object of additional HTTP headers to send with all Grafana API requests
environmentVariables.name: GRAFANA_EXTRA_HEADERS
